2606.20101.title: Hybrid Diffusion Transformer for Instruction-Guided Audio Editing via Rectified Flow
2606.20101.paper_summary: Audio editing aims to modify specific content in an existing audio clip according to a natural language instruction while preserving the remaining acoustic content. Despite the remarkable progress of diffusion models, existing training-based editing methods mainly rely on the local inductive biases and cross-attention interaction in convolutional U-Net backbones, which often hinder long-range semantic alignment and precise understanding and localization of instructions. In contrast, diffusion transformers provide stronger global modeling and multimodal fusion, but existing editing architectures usually adopt a simple stack of MMDiT and DiT blocks. Applying joint attention over concatenated audio and text tokens in all blocks results in quadratic complexity with respect to token length. To balance editing performance and efficiency, we propose a hybrid two-stage diffusion transformer architecture for instruction-guided audio editing based on rectified flow matching. It performs joint attention over audio and text tokens to establish coarse semantic alignment at low-resolution stage, then switches to alternating joint-attention and cross-attention blocks to refine editing details at high-resolution stage. This coarse-to-fine strategy enables efficient and accurate instruction-guided audio editing. Experiments show that the proposed framework achieves notable performance gains on challenging editing tasks involving overlapping audio events and complex instructions, while substantially improving editing efficiency with a compact model.
2606.20101.paper_summary_zh: 音頻編輯旨在根據自然語言指令修改現有音頻片段中的特定內容，同時保留其餘的聲音內容。儘管擴散模型取得了顯著進展，但現有的基於訓練的編輯方法主要依賴於卷積 U-Net 主幹中的局部歸納偏差和交叉注意力交互，這往往妨礙了長距離語義對齊以及對指令的精確理解和定位。相比之下，擴散Transformer提供了更強的全局建模和多模態融合，但現有的編輯架構通常採用簡單的 MMDiT 和 DiT 模塊堆疊。在所有模塊中對串接的音頻和文本標記應用聯合注意力會導致相對於標記長度的二次複雜度。為了平衡編輯性能和效率，我們提出了一種基於修正流匹配的混合兩階段擴散Transformer架構，用於指令引導的音頻編輯。它在低解析度階段對音頻和文本標記執行聯合注意力，以建立粗略的語義對齊，然後切換到交替的聯合注意力和交叉注意力模塊，以在高解析度階段細化編輯細節。這種由粗到細的策略使得指令引導的音頻編輯變得高效且準確。實驗表明，所提出的框架在涉及重疊音頻事件和複雜指令的挑戰性編輯任務中實現了顯著的性能提升，同時以緊湊的模型顯著提高了編輯效率。
2606.20101.author: Liting Gao et.al.
2606.20101.authors: Liting Gao, Yonggang Zhu, Yaru Chen, Dongyu Wang, Shubin Zhang, Zhenbo Li, Jean-Yves Guillemaut, Wenwu Wang
